national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Gold Buyers USA
buyers.address: 613B S Hill St, Los Angeles, CA 90014
buyers.hours: Mon-Fri 10:00 AM-5:00 PM; Sat 10:00 AM-2:00 PM; walk-in or appointment
buyers.payout_claims: "We Pay More!" and "guarantee to offer you more cash than any of our competitors" — no percent-of-spot stated
buyers.testing_transparency: Not described on site; free evaluation with no obligation to sell
buyers.evidence_notes: LA city page lists 613B S Hill St downtown (Jewelry District) plus a South Bay location at 16916 Hawthorne Blvd, Lawndale. Claims '40 Years Of Experience' and 'Licensed Gold Buyers'. Sell-gold page: 'Feel free to make an appointment or walk-in', evaluation is 'free' with 'no obligation to sell', pays cash, company check, or bank wire. No testing method or rate table published. Note: some third-party listings show 607 S Hill St Ste 241 — own site says 613B S Hill St.

buyers.name: Los Angeles Gold & Diamond Exchange (Sell Gold Watch Diamonds LA)
buyers.hours: Mon-Fri 10 AM-7 PM; Sat-Sun 12 PM-5 PM; walk-in or appointment (they suggest calling first for a rough phone estimate)
buyers.payout_claims: "Pays up to 99% of the value of your gold"; elsewhere "95-99% depending on the current price of gold per karat"
buyers.testing_transparency: Evaluated by professional jewelers and gemologists; specific assay method not described
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: 'PAYS UP TO 99% OF THE VALUE OF YOUR GOLD' and '95-99% depending on the current price of gold per karat'. States 'Fully licensed and insured'. Discloses a $150 fee (plus shipping both ways) if a designer item turns out to be non-authentic; standard appraisals free. Buys gold, silver, platinum, coins, scrap, estate jewelry, watches. Address is Koreatown (W 3rd St), not the downtown Jewelry District. Years in business not stated.

buyers.name: Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds
buyers.address: 617 S Hill St, Los Angeles, CA 90014
buyers.payout_claims: "Top dollar" for gold, diamonds, watches, gemstones; no percent-of-spot stated
buyers.testing_transparency: Says it uses the latest technology and current global market data; specific assay method not described
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: located in the 'Downtown L.A Jewelry District, California Jewelry Mart' at 617 S. Hill Street. FAQ: 'No, our evaluations are free and carry no obligation.' 'Trusted Gold, Diamond & Rolex Buyer Since 2007.' Private appointments bookable online, by phone, or in person; same-day cash advertised. Hours not published on site.

buyers.name: LA Cash For Gold (Division of the National Gold Market Corporation)
buyers.hours: Mon-Fri 11:00 AM-5:00 PM; closed Sat-Sun; APPOINTMENT ONLY
buyers.payout_claims: "75% to 80% for gold jewelry"; "We Pay 90% of the Spot Price for Gold Bullions and Coins"
buyers.testing_transparency: Publishes a live jewelry price chart by karat and purity; in-person assay method not described on site
buyers.evidence_notes: One of very few LA-area buyers publishing explicit percent-of-spot: about page states 75-80% of value for gold jewelry and 90% of spot for bullion/coins. Homepage hosts a 'Live Jewelry Price Chart' (values load dynamically) plus example payouts (e.g., $131.61 for a 14K wedding band). Established 2007 per third-party mentions but not confirmed on own site. Site references both Pasadena and Los Angeles locations, yet the 'Los Angeles location' page displays the Pasadena address (642 E Colorado Blvd) — LA storefront address unverified.

buyers.name: Los Angeles Gold Buyer Exchange
buyers.address: 1890 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90006 (one of 11 published LA-area locations)
buyers.payout_claims: "Top market prices, guaranteed" and "consistently offer the highest prices" — no percent-of-spot stated
buyers.testing_transparency: "Accurate Testing" using certified scales and advanced testing done on site
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: 'Gold Buyers Since 2011' and '14+ Years of Experience'. Lists 11 street addresses across LA (Pacoima, Watts, Vermont Ave, S Western Ave, North Hollywood, Slauson Ave, S Broadway, Westlake, Walnut Park, Panorama City). Advertises 'Instant Payment' / same-day payment; accepts 10k-24k gold in any condition including broken jewelry, coins, bullion, scrap, dental gold. Hours and appointment policy not published; per-location detail thin.

buyers.name: South Bay Gold
buyers.address: 3804 Sepulveda Blvd Suite C, Torrance, CA 90505
buyers.payout_claims: "Pay the highest prices in Southern California for any gold, silver, and platinum guaranteed!"
buyers.testing_transparency: Free testing of unmarked pieces; weighs your gold in front of you in grams; spot price checked daily at 10 AM; karat purity determined as part of a published four-point valuation process
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage publishes a 'Gold Buy Price' table with per-pennyweight and per-gram buy prices for 14kt-24kt. Sell-gold page: 'We more importantly will weigh your gold right in front of you so there is no confusion as to the exact weight.' Refiner status stated: 'Because we refine your gold to manufacture our jewelry lines.' Claims 'over 20 years of buying and selling experience' (diamonds). Walk-in implied ('stop by or call'); hours not published on pages fetched. Second phone (Manhattan location): 310-796-1800.

buyers.name: Gardens Jewelry, Gold & Loan
buyers.address: 11858 E Carson St, Hawaiian Gardens, CA 90716
buyers.payout_claims: "Get up to 3x more cash than our competitors" and "highest prices paid for gold" — no percent-of-spot stated
buyers.testing_transparency: Electronic spectrometer assay (Niton XL2 analyzer) plus certified, state-licensed scales; free valuation
buyers.evidence_notes: Self-described 'luxury pawn shop near East Los Angeles' — buys outright or lends against gold, diamonds, silver, watches. Cash-for-gold page names its Niton XL2 XRF analyzer and 'certified & state-licensed scales', states 'Licensed bonded and insured' and 'OVER 10 YEARS IN BUSINESS'. Prices referenced against 'live current precious metals market prices'. Storefront is in Hawaiian Gardens (LA County), roughly 20 miles from downtown despite East-LA marketing. Walk-in ('come in for a Free Valuation'); hours not published on page fetched.

buyers.name: Beverly Hills Jewelers
buyers.address: 259 S Beverly Dr, Beverly Hills, CA 90212
buyers.payout_claims: "Top cash for gold" — no percent-of-spot or rate details published
buyers.evidence_notes: Retail jeweler with a dedicated 'WE BUY' section: 'TOP CASH FOR GOLD' (/pages/sell-gold-in-los-angeles) plus pages for diamonds, estate jewelry, precious stones, and watches. 'Since 1974, Beverly Hills Jewelers has been proudly showcasing one of the largest selection of diamond engagement rings...' Address, phone, and hours published in footer. The sell-gold page itself renders thin (JS-heavy), so buying terms, testing method, and appointment policy are unverified.
